Petition For Order Determining Trust Property
Off Calendar May-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Harbour for Shirlee Trott.

The Court granted the Petition For Order Determining Trust Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
